DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT JOHN REAMPULLA MTN FOR DISCOVERY SANCTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MCGLYNN IS PROHIBITED FROM SUPPORTING HIS CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MEDICAL NEGLIGENCE AGAINST DR. RAMPALLA WITH ANY FACTS OR DOCUMENTS WHICH WOULD HAVE BEEN RESPONSIVE TO DR. RAMPALLA'S FIRST SETS OF FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,285., TO BE PAID WITHIN 10 CALENDAR DAYS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: TOM COHEN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ; Index
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAINT FRANCIS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant met its initial burden by submitting an expert declaration stating that the applicable standard of care was met. (See Declaration of Patrice A. Callagy, R.N., par. 8.) ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Russell A. Robinson, of the Law Offices of Russell A. Robinson, Tel. 415.255.0462, for plaintiffs and opposing party;
Robert V. Good, of The Goldman Law Firm, Tel. 415.435.5500, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT JOHN REAMPULLA Motion For Terminating Discovery Sanctions is taken off calendar pursuant to dismissal with prejudice of complaint filed on OCT-02-2014. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Fmtn For Discovery Sanction
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Good, of The Goldman Law Firm, Tel. 415.435.5500, for defendants and moving party;
No other appeanrances.

RULING: DEFENDANT JOHN REAMPULLA Mtn For Discovery Sanction is granted as follows: Plaintiff McGlynn is prohibited from supporting his cause of action for medical negligence against Dr. Rampalla with any facts or documents which would have been responsive to Dr. Rampalla's first sets of form interrogatories, special interrogatories and requests for production. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,285., to be paid within 10 calendar days. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Gool, Esq., of the Goldman Law Firm (415-435-5500) for John Reampulla, Defendant and moving party
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court having considered the moving, opposing and reply papers and the arguments of counsel, rules as follows: DEFENDANT JOHN REAMPULLA's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses is Granted, no Opposition filed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $760. Order is signed in open Court. (see scanned order for details) Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
